title: Why I Believe Deere & Company Is Now A Buy
text: Deere & Company is a global manufacturer and distributor of agricultural, construction, and forestry equipment, as well as financial services. The company demonstrated strong performance in its business divisions, with increases in sales and operating profit across all segments. Deere is focused on cost management, technology integration, and expanding its battery manufacturing capacity to drive future growth.

title: Deere: Low Valuation, Rising Dividend Outweigh A Tepid Growth Trajectory
text: Deere & Co. gets a buy rating with an attractive 11x P/E and rising dividend, but macro risks and slowing agricultural demand should be monitored. Deere reported solid Q3 earnings, beating expectations, but saw a downtrend in stock price due to lower production and higher inventories. Analysts have mixed views on Deere, with some citing slowing agricultural demand and increasing inventories as risks, while others see stronger earnings and dividend growth.

title: John Deere Foundation announces $19 million in grants aimed at eliminating global hunger
text: Direct grants will be awarded to World Food Program USA, One Acre Fund, and The Nature Conservancy  MOLINE, Ill. , Oct. 26, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Today, the John Deere Foundation announced a series of grants totaling $19 million aimed at eliminating hunger by increasing access to food, uplifting resource-constrained farmers, and supporting global food systems.
